getAddress() - Method in class myatt.model.Customer

This Method retrieves all the appointments from the MySQL database.

This Method retrieves all the contacts information from the database.

This Method retrieves all the countries from the database.

This Method retrieves all customer information from the database.

This Method retrieves all the user information from the database.

getAppointmentsByCustomer(int) - Static method in class myatt.dao.AppointmentDao
Retrieves all appointments for a specific customer based on their Customer_ID.
getAppointmentsByMonth() - Method in class myatt.controller.ReportsController
Retrieves all appointments by month from the database and populates the tableview.
getAppointmentsByMonth() - Static method in class myatt.dao.AppointmentDao
Retrieves all appointments by month from the database.
getAppointmentsByType() - Method in class myatt.controller.ReportsController
retrieves all appointments by type from the database and populates the tableview.
getAppointmentsByType() - Static method in class myatt.dao.AppointmentDao
Retrieves all appointments by type from the database.

Retrieves the existing connection or opens a new connection if one does not exist.

Retrieves a contact from the database by the Contact_ID.
